settings.headline: The autonomous-AI engine powering every EvoTech workflow.
settings.subhead: EvolveAI-Engine is the flagship intelligence layer inside every EvoTech SaaS app — from SentryOps to Essential8 Compass. Launch agents, orchestrate APIs, collect data, and analyse outcomes from one command plane.

settings.headline: Generate. Connect. Collect. Analyse.
settings.body: EvolveAI-Engine turns plain-English outcomes into production-grade workflows. One-click OAuth into 400+ apps. Real-time observability on every run. Exec-ready dashboards and compliance packs ready to export.

settings.text: Full audit trail for every run (Essential Eight aligned)
BYO-Model: Claude, GPT, Llama, Bedrock, Azure OpenAI

settings.headline: Operational questions, answered.
settings.lede: Everything you want to know before you automate with EvolveAI-Engine.

settings.question: What does EvolveAI-Engine actually do?
settings.answer: EvolveAI-Engine is the core autonomous-AI layer inside every EvoTech SaaS product. It turns natural-language outcomes into running workflows — triaging SOC alerts, running compliance checks, procuring hardware, reconciling invoices — across 400+ integrated apps.

settings.question: Where is it hosted?
settings.answer: Live at evolve.evotech.au on AWS Sydney and Melbourne regions. Optional single-tenant deployments available on the Scale plan.

settings.question: Which LLMs does it support?
settings.answer: Anthropic Claude, OpenAI GPT, AWS Bedrock (Llama, Titan), Azure OpenAI, and on-prem open-source models. Enterprise data-not-used-for-training agreements on every vendor.

settings.question: Is my data ever sent outside Australia?
settings.answer: No. All inference, memory, and storage is pinned to AU regions on the Business plan and above.

settings.question: Can I embed EvolveAI-Engine in my own app?
settings.answer: Yes — we expose REST and event-stream APIs so you can invoke any agent from your own product. See the developer docs at evolve.evotech.au/docs.

settings.headline: Stop doing work a *machine can do.~
settings.lede: Live now at evolve.evotech.au — the flagship engine behind every EvoTech SaaS app.
